Our Story

Built by builders,
for builders.

Siterifty started when two indie hackers got burned on shady website deals. We built the marketplace we wished existed — transparent, fast, and low-fee.

Read our story

How it works

Six steps to your next deal

01 · Seller

List your site

Create a listing in minutes. Set your price, add metrics, and reach thousands of active buyers instantly.

02 · Buyer

Buyers find you

Investors and indie hackers browse listings every day. Your site gets real eyes from real buyers.

03 · Deal

Close & get paid

Secure escrow handles everything. Buyer confirms, funds land in your wallet the same day.

04 · Hosting

Buyer keeps it live

New owner subscribes at $49.99/mo — databases, serverless, admin panel all managed for them.

05 · Wallet

Top up your wallet

Add funds via PayPal once. Use balance for listings, plans, purchases, and hosting — all in one place.

06 · Growth

Scale with a plan

Upgrade from Free to Pro — more listing slots, lower fees, and priority support as you grow.

Money flow

From listing to payout

Seller lists the site
Set price, attach metrics and traffic data. Goes live to thousands of buyers instantly.
Buyer places offer
Funds are held in secure escrow — neither side can access them until the deal confirms.
Transfer & verification
Domain, codebase, and assets move to buyer. Both parties confirm delivery on-platform.
Payout hits your wallet
Escrow releases to your Siterifty wallet instantly. Withdraw or reinvest in your next deal.
Buyer activates hosting
Optional managed hosting at $49.99/mo keeps their new site running with zero DevOps hassle.

Why Siterifty

Built for serious digital dealmakers

Secure Escrow

Funds are held by Siterifty until both parties confirm the deal. Nobody gets cheated.

Vetted Listings

Every listing is reviewed. Metrics are verified. No fake traffic. No inflated numbers.

Managed Hosting

Buyers keep sites live with our $49.99/mo stack — database, serverless, admin panel included.

Lowest Fees

Start at 30% free, drop to just 5% on Pro. Keep the lion's share of every deal you close.

Fast Closings

Most deals close in under 14 days. Our streamlined process cuts out the middleman noise.

AI Support Chat

Get instant answers on listings, deals, billing, and plans — powered by our intelligent assistant.

Got questions?

Frequently asked

When a buyer makes an offer, their funds are held securely in Siterifty escrow. Once you transfer the domain, codebase, and assets and the buyer confirms receipt, the funds are released to your wallet instantly. Neither party can access the funds during the transfer window.
Free plan: 30% fee. Starter ($20/mo): 15%. Growth ($40/mo): 10%. Pro ($50/mo): only 5%. Upgrading to Pro on even a single $500 sale saves you $125 in fees — more than covering your subscription cost.
SaaS, content sites, newsletters, e-commerce, directories, tools, Chrome extensions, mobile apps, and more. If it generates revenue or has clear buyer value, it belongs on Siterifty. Listings go through a brief review to confirm the metrics are accurate.
Most deals close within 7–14 days from first offer. Simple sites with clear metrics close faster. Complex technical transfers may take a few days longer. Our on-platform verification flow keeps both parties aligned throughout.
Yes. After purchase, you can subscribe to Siterifty Managed Hosting at $49.99/month. This gives you a fully managed stack — database, serverless functions, and an admin dashboard — with zero DevOps required. Pay from your wallet balance.
All transactions are processed by PayPal with 256-bit SSL encryption. Siterifty never stores your card details. Wallet top-ups are one-time payments with no recurring charges, and balances never expire.

PayPal Buyer Protection

This is a one-time payment. You will not be automatically charged again. Funds are added to your Siterifty wallet and can be used for purchases on this platform.
Loading PayPal…
Questions
What can my wallet balance be used for?
Your balance can be used for site purchases, monthly plan upgrades (Starter, Growth, Pro), managed hosting fees, and any future credits or promotions we offer. It never expires.
Can I withdraw my balance?
Wallet balances are non-refundable and cannot be withdrawn to a bank or PayPal account. The balance is store credit only. If you believe there's been an error, contact support.
Why is there a processing fee?
PayPal charges a standard processing fee of 3.49% + $0.49 for each transaction. This fee goes directly to PayPal — Siterifty does not keep any of it.
Is this payment secure?
Yes. All payments are processed by PayPal using 256-bit SSL encryption. We never store your card details. Your payment is covered by PayPal Buyer Protection.
Does my balance expire?
No. Your wallet balance never expires. You can top up whenever you like and spend at your own pace with no time pressure.
Balance Added!
Your wallet has been topped up successfully. Happy browsing!

Common Questions
How do I list a site for sale?
Go to the main marketplace and tap + List a Site. Fill in the details — URL, revenue, traffic, asking price — and submit. Your listing goes live immediately on the Free plan (1 slot) or up to your plan limit.
What payment methods are accepted?
We currently process payments through PayPal. All site purchases and subscription payments are handled securely through PayPal's checkout. Your wallet balance can be used toward any purchase.
What are the platform fees?
Free plan: 30% fee per sale. Starter: 15%. Growth: 10%. Pro: 5% — the lowest on the platform. Upgrade anytime from the Account tab to keep more of what you earn.
Can I cancel my subscription?
Yes, anytime. Go to Settings → Billing and switch to the Free plan. Your paid features remain active until the end of your current billing period. No penalties, no hassle.
How does wallet balance work?
Top up your wallet with any amount via PayPal. Your balance is then used for site purchases, monthly plan payments, and hosting fees — all in one place. Balances never expire and are non-refundable store credit.

Transfer Account
⚠ THIS CANNOT BE REVERSED
Transferring your account permanently hands full ownership — including all listings, wallet balance, purchase history, and plan — to the recipient. You will lose all access immediately. This action is encrypted, logged, and irreversible.
AES-256 · Transfer log encrypted · Immutable audit trail
1 Recipient Email
Enter the email address of the person you want to transfer this account to. They will receive a transfer notification email.
2 Identity Verification
To confirm your identity, answer the questions below using your current account credentials.
Button activates when all fields are filled correctly
Delete Account
This is permanent
Deleting your account removes all your listings, messages, wallet balance, and transaction history. This cannot be undone.
What will be deleted
All active and draft listings
All messages and conversations
Wallet balance (non-refundable)
Transaction history and reviews
Profile, saved searches, and referrals
